subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! The letters thou didst send have reached Me, and concerning the events in Tihran, they conveyed the utmost sorrow [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان مکاتیبیکه ارسال نموده بودی رسید از وقایع طهران نهایت احزان
subcodes.subjects: @personal instructions, @chastisement and requital, @consolation and comfort, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
